subject: Joey's: mobile menu + website preview
text:
Hi Joey's,

I put together a live preview for Joey's:
https://joey-s-restaurant-dev.pages.dev

What I checked before sending this:
- The menu is based on your official menu source: https://www.joeys.com.au/menus
- The mobile menu currently has 11 cleaned items across 3 sections.
- Call, map, and reservation actions are set up for mobile visitors.
- Local AI audit: pass, score 100, 0 finding(s).

I also generated proof assets for review:
- Desktop screenshot: clients/joey-s-restaurant/outreach/screenshots/desktop.png
- Mobile screenshot: clients/joey-s-restaurant/outreach/screenshots/mobile.png
- Scroll demo video: clients/joey-s-restaurant/outreach/demo.mp4

If you like the direction, we can launch it as-is or make up to 3 rounds of changes before going live.

Best,
Matthew
Profits Local
